# Task 12 implementation for Vfs serialization (2026-03-13 05:52Z)

_**User**_

Implement Task 12 from docs/plans/2026-03-13-dev-shell-impl-plan.md.

**Task 12: .bin — 与 Vfs 的 load/save 接口**

In src/serialization.rs add:

pub fn save_to_file(vfs: &Vfs, path: &std::path::Path) -> std::io::Result<()> {
    let bytes = serialize(vfs).map_err(|e| std::io::Error::new(std::io::ErrorKind::Other, e))?;
    std::fs::write(path, bytes)
}

pub fn load_from_file(path: &std::path::Path) -> std::io::Result<Vfs> {
    let bytes = std::fs::read(path)?;
    deserialize(&bytes).map_err(|e| std::io::Error::new(std::io::ErrorKind::InvalidData, e))
}

serialize/deserialize may return a custom Error type; map it to std::io::Error so save_to_file and load_from_file return std::io::Result. Implement std::error::Error for the custom type if needed so .source() works, or use Box<dyn std::error::Error + Send + Sync> for the io::Error source.

Run cargo test. Commit: git add src/serialization.rs && git commit -m "feat(serialization): save_to_file / load_from_file"

Report: done, commit.
